notes: HTML cache covered 223 schools (224 dirs incl. one unrelated 'wp_team_c3').
Realistic data ceilings observed: only 47/223 schools have admission.html, 35/223 have progress.html, 43/223 have about.html.
Most schools publish admission/progress data via PDF, not inline HTML, limiting numeric extraction.
Facility extraction draws from about/philosophy/curriculum/schoollife/root pages with 24 keyword patterns.
Progress extraction uses 100+ university name patterns; rows include both numeric counts (33) and presence-only mentions (171).
Admission extraction yields quota figures (募集 X名), exam dates, subject/timing/scoring metadata.
All rows include source_url and rights_level='archive_only' (set by integrator).

admission.ceiling_reason: Only 39 schools have parseable admission HTML; rest reference PDFs

progress.ceiling_reason: Only 72 schools have university-name-bearing pages; PDFs not parsed
